subject: Charged twice for my subscription this month
body: Hi, I just noticed two charges of $14.99 on my card on the same day (June 3rd) for my Nimbus Plus plan. Invoice numbers are INV-77410 and INV-77411. Can someone refund the duplicate charge?

subject: URGENT - lost access to all my files before a client deadline
body: I opened the app this morning and every single file in my workspace shows as 'unavailable'. I have a client presentation in two hours and need these files immediately. Please help as soon as possible.

subject: Feature request: dark mode for mobile app
body: Loving the service so far! Would be great if the mobile app had a dark mode option like the desktop app already does. Not a big deal, just a nice-to-have for night time use.

subject: App crashes every time I open a large video file
body: Whenever I try to preview an .mp4 file over about 2GB, the desktop app freezes for a few seconds and then crashes completely. Happens consistently on both my laptop and my work PC.

subject: How do I change my account email address?
body: I recently changed jobs and would like to update the email address associated with my account to my new personal email. I can't find this option in settings.

subject: Two-factor authentication not sending codes
body: I enabled 2FA last week and now the SMS codes aren't arriving when I try to log in from a new device. I'm locked out of my account right now and have important documents I need today.

subject: Absolutely furious - cancelled my plan and still got billed
body: I cancelled my subscription on May 2nd and got a confirmation email. I was just charged again on June 1st for $24.99. This is the second time this has happened. I want a full refund immediately.

subject: Suggestion: add a 'recently deleted' view
body: It would be helpful to have a single place to see everything I've deleted recently across all folders, instead of digging through the trash in each folder separately. Just a suggestion for a future release.

subject: Files not syncing between devices
body: My laptop and desktop stopped syncing about three days ago. The sync icon just spins and never finishes. I've restarted the app and my computer several times. Not urgent, just annoying.

subject: Mobile app won't update past version 4.2
body: The App Store shows an update is available but every time I tap update it downloads partway and then fails with a generic error. I've tried deleting and reinstalling the app twice.

subject: Need an itemized invoice for my company's expense report
body: Could someone send me an itemized invoice for the last three months of charges on my business account? My finance team needs it for an expense report due Friday.

subject: Is there an API for automating uploads?
body: We're a small team looking to automate nightly backups into our workspace from an internal script. Is there a public API or CLI tool available, and where can I find documentation and rate limits?

subject: Thank you for the quick support last week!
body: Just wanted to say the support team helped me recover an accidentally deleted folder really quickly last Tuesday. Really appreciated the fast turnaround. Keep up the good work!

subject: Accidentally downgraded my plan and lost extra storage
body: I meant to click 'manage plan' but accidentally confirmed a downgrade from Plus to Basic. Now I'm over my new storage limit and can't upload new files. I need to upload files today for a deadline.

subject: Storage usage shown is way higher than my actual files
body: The dashboard says I'm using 380GB but when I manually total up my folders it's closer to 210GB. This has been the case for a couple of weeks now. Wondering if it's a caching bug.

subject: Can't log in after password reset
body: I requested a password reset yesterday, set a new password, and now the app just says 'invalid credentials' every time, on both desktop and the website. I've tried resetting twice more with no luck.

subject: Question about what happens to files after downgrade
body: thinking about switching plans, what happens exactly, also is there a way to see all my devices connected to the account somewhere

subject: Everything is broken help
body: nothing works right now. tried a few things. still broken. please advise
